query:
SELECT 'intakeFile' as source, ifa.questionId as location, ifa.fileName, ifa.fileUrl, ifa.uploadedBy, ifa.createdAt
FROM intakeFileAttachments ifa 
JOIN organizations o ON o.id = ifa.organizationId 
WHERE o.slug = 'RMCA'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'taskFile' as source, CONCAT('task:', fa.taskId) as location, fa.fileName, fa.fileUrl, fa.uploadedBy, fa.createdAt
FROM fileAttachments fa
JOIN organizations o ON o.id = fa.organizationId
WHERE o.slug = 'RMCA'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'note' as source, CONCAT('note:', n.id) as location, n.fileName, n.fileUrl, n.authorEmail as uploadedBy, n.createdAt
FROM orgNotes n
JOIN organizations o ON o.id = n.organizationId
WHERE o.slug = 'RMCA'
ORDER BY createdAt DESC;
